授業目的: Students will cover topics introduced by the instructor. Each topic will include a small group discussion, followed by a presentation and finally a report. Students are expected to actively participate in the lessons and contribute postively while maintaining a safe and relaxed atmosphere for their peers.
特記事項: 【合併】English Communication Advanced Topics（総合政策学部）/英語アドバンスト・トピックス（総合政策学部）
授業の概要・背景: The course is subject to change based on class size. Accommodations can be made for special requests.
授業方法: Face-to-face with some online componentsInteraction with peers is important for a good grade.

第1回:
Start-up Week - On-demand class (90 minutes)
Course Orientation
Check LUNA for course materials
Students will be required to research a current event and bring an article or story to the week 2 class

Core Week 1 Face-to-face class (90 minutes)

Present ideas and discuss them in a small group
Present the topic

Group presentations
Write a report on the topic

The final presentation will be a pecha-kucha style presentation. Insructions and guidelines will be provided in class. 
Students will practise and prepare their presentations under the instructor's guidance.

教科書/Required texts0: There are no required texts for this class. The instructor will provide materials as needed.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: The reports on each topic will be completed in class
成績評価Grading2: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
Students will give 6 presentations in this class.
成績評価Grading3: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Students are expected to contribute actively and positively in the lessons
